name: Nadav Kohen
cooked: Is there any reason to do something like this over using Pseudo-random secret sharing/Replicated secret sharing like in Arctic? It seems similar to the BLISK concept but without the ZKPs which I saw as the primary justification for not just using replicated secret sharing.
topic_title: K-of-N threshhold key generation scheme by limited shared secrets
topic_html_title: K-of-N threshhold key generation scheme by limited shared secrets
raw: Is there any reason to do something like this over using Pseudo-random secret sharing/Replicated secret sharing like in [Arctic](https://eprint.iacr.org/2024/466)? It seems similar to the [BLISK](https://delvingbitcoin.org/t/blisk-boolean-circuit-logic-integrated-into-the-single-key/2217/15) concept but without the ZKPs which I saw as the primary justification for not just using replicated secret sharing.
excerpt: Is there any reason to do something like this over using Pseudo-random secret sharing/Replicated secret sharing like in Arctic? It seems similar to the BLISK concept but without the ZKPs which I saw as the primary justification for not just using replicated secret sharing.
